title: Short cut to opening subitems from parent items
excerpt: Does anyone know of a “hot key” or keyboard shortcut to open subitems from parent items? For instance, ctrl+G will collapse and open items under groups. Is there a shortcut for collapsing and opening subitems?

posts.author: meganmansfield (Megan Mansfield)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know of a “hot key” or keyboard shortcut to open subitems from parent items? For instance, ctrl+G will collapse and open items under groups. Is there a shortcut for collapsing and opening subitems?

posts.author: meganmansfield (Megan Mansfield)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT any thoughts on this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Megan,

Thanks for flagging this!

You can expand or collapse all subitems at once using shortcuts:

  • Command + i (mac)
  • Ctrl + i (PC, windows)

Let me know if this is what you’re looking for!

posts.author: meganmansfield (Megan Mansfield)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much Bianca! This is exactly what I needed.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem Megan, glad I could help!
